allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: The Path Is You landing page

- Cinematic landing page with hero section and parallax effects
- Lead capture form with Airtable backend integration
- Responsive design with elegant typography \(Cormorant Garamond + Montserrat\)
- Real-time form validation \(email, first name required, last name optional\)
- Vercel serverless function for secure Airtable integration
- Source field automatically set to ''thepathisyou_audiobook''
- WCAG AA accessibility compliant
- Social proof testimonials section
- Author bio section
- Sticky mobile CTA
- Performance optimized with smooth animations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(a genuine reflection on how it lands for me."
- Custom checkbox design with gold border and purple-gold gradient fill
- Smooth animations and hover effects
- Positioned between last name and CTA button

SMART CTA BUTTON LOGIC:
- Button starts in disabled state \(grayed out\)
- Only activates when ALL required fields are filled:
  ✓ Email address \(valid format\)
  ✓ First name \(minimum 2 characters\)
  ✓ Commitment checkbox \(checked\)
- Real-time validation on every input change
- Visual feedback: disabled = gray, enabled = purple gradient
- Cannot submit without checkbox checked

VALIDATION:
- Client-side: Button disabled until all required fields complete
- Server-side: API validates commitment = true before accepting
- Error messages for missing checkbox
- Smooth UX with instant feedback

AIRTABLE INTEGRATION:
- New field: ''commitment'' \(stores "Yes" or "No"\)
- Required field validation on API
- Sent with all form submissions

STYLING:
- Custom checkbox matches form design language
- Gold border, white background
- Purple-gold gradient when checked
- Checkmark icon animation
- Hover effects on label and checkbox
- Focus states for accessibility
- Mobile responsive

ACCESSIBILITY:
- ARIA required attribute
- Keyboard navigable
- Focus visible states
- Screen reader friendly labels
- Error announcements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
